name: office
description: Office is a company operating system for coding agents: issue-first pipeline, departments, hiring, rituals, lessons, and verifier acceptance.

plugins.name: office
plugins.description: Deploys a curated agent company into any repository: self-contained issue specs, pointer dispatch, model-class routing, weak-dispatch for cheap executors, fresh-context verification, department charters, hiring offers, incident drills, business reviews, high-stakes consilium, living state docs, lessons, and generated layouts for multiple CLIs.
